summary: Iteration 9: Testing 4 bug fixes - Google Sign-In (Emergent OAuth), Forgot Password, Theme Toggle styling, Sohba 2-column masonry grid. ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend 23/23 pytest tests passed. Frontend UI verified via Playwright.

minor.issue: 403 error in console logs - external API issue, non-blocking

seed_data_creation: TEST_iter9 post created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 bug fixes verified working: 1) Google Sign-In uses Emergent OAuth (redirect to auth.emergentagent.com, callback with session_id), 2) Forgot password shows email input and sends request, 3) Theme toggle is inside container (tested at x=41), 4) Sohba has 2-column masonry grid with images. PermissionManager appears on first load - dismiss with X button.
mocked_apis_note: Forgot password doesn't actually send emails (placeholder). Sohba images use Unsplash placeholders.

bug_fix_2_forgot_password.auth_page_forgot_link: ✅ Shows 'نسيت كلمة المرور؟' below login button
bug_fix_2_forgot_password.forgot_password_page: ✅ Shows email input and 'إرسال رابط الاستعادة' button

bug_fix_3_theme_toggle.theme_toggle_in_more: ✅ Found at position x=41, y=583 (inside container)

bug_fix_4_sohba_redesign.grid_cards: ✅ Cards with images and heart overlays
bug_fix_4_sohba_redesign.category_tabs: ✅ Shows الكل, عام, القرآن الكريم, الحديث الشريف, رمضان, etc.
bug_fix_4_sohba_redesign.create_fab: ✅ FAB opens create sheet with category selection
bug_fix_4_sohba_redesign.post_detail: ✅ Clicking grid card opens post detail with comments

additional_checks.bottom_nav: ✅ 5 tabs: الرئيسية, الصلاة, صُحبة, الرسائل, المزيد (NOT حسابي)
additional_checks.sohba_posts_real: ✅ GET /api/sohba/posts returns real posts from MongoDB
